title: selaginella permutata
intro: Selaginella permutata, also known as spike moss or resurrection fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae and is native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which make it beneficial for treating various health conditions such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant activity, making it a potential natural remedy for chronic diseases. Selaginella permutata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts have been studied for their potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
